title: arnoseris humilis
intro: Arnoseris humilis, also known as Small Hare's Ear or Small Arnoseris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and soothing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Arnoseris humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
